## Our Specialities

[![Face Skin Care.](https://i0.wp.com/madhavisskinclinic.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/Downloader.la-62c6ce38c2e2f.jpg?fit=300%2C200&ssl=1)](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/skin/)

### [Skin](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/skin/)

From gentle skin break out to serious pustules we deal with different skin conditions through a right blend of fundamental medicines and high level systems.

[![](https://i0.wp.com/madhavisskinclinic.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/hair.jpg?fit=300%2C200&ssl=1)](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/hair/)

### [Hair](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/hair/)

We treat all hair related issues like hair fall, dandruff, male pattern baldness etc and offers best solution through medication and procedures like PRP, Stem Cell therapy, Hair Transplantation etc.

[![The cosmetologist makes the  Microdermabrasion procedure of the facial skin of a woman in a beauty salon.Cosmetology and professional skin care.](https://i0.wp.com/madhavisskinclinic.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/Downloader.la-62c6cfe07d1dd.jpg?fit=1024%2C688&ssl=1)](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/body/)

### [Body](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/body/)

From brow wrinkles, to crowfeet, facial structure and jaw remedy, HIFU, Stretch marks we take on an extensive methodology for stylish revision and set-up of medicines and systems for many facial deformities and Full Body Treatments.

[![woman wearing protective glasses, getting laser facial treatment. Facial skin rejuvenation](https://i0.wp.com/madhavisskinclinic.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/dermasurgery.jpg?fit=300%2C200&ssl=1)](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/lasers/)

### [Lasers](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/lasers/)

Laser treatments are one of the fastest ways to deal with acne removal, pigmentation, scar reduction, etc. Our experienced dermatologists use their clinical expertise and offer for all your skin, nail and hair concerns.

## About Dr. Madhavi's Advanced Skin Hair and Laser Clinic

Dr. Madhavi’s Advanced Skin Hair and Laser Clinic were established with a vision to bring affordable Skin Care to everyone. Having started in 2010 with clinical dermatology and skin procedures, today we have increased our scope to include all clinical dermatology, trichology (diagnosis and treatment of hair and scalp conditions including hair fall and dandruff), nail disorders and all skin related cosmetic problems.

[Consult Now](https://madhavisskinclinic.in/contact-us/)

## Take an Appointment

## Call: +91 9642659757

## Our Specialities

## Why Clients Choose Our Clinic

We at Madhavi’s skin clinic are committed to provide world class treatment for your skin and hair.

**BOOK AN APPOINTMENT**  to get the best skincare treatment in Hyderabad.

Call Our Clinic :  +(91)- 9642659757, 040-40136113

## Get A Quote

## Book an Appointment

## Our Mission Is to Provide a Professional & Honest  Approach to Skin Care

### Experienced Doctors

Team of experienced doctors attend to every case. Skin analysis will be done, understand your skin tone and design a treatment plan to suit your skin care needs and requirements.

### Professional & Friendly Staff

Well trained and professional team of health care givers assist you through every step in our clinic. You can be rest assured of our quality services.

### On Call 24/7

Our health care givers are available to assist to answer any of your questions through various channels like e-mail, online chat or telephone.

## Technology & Equipment

![](https://i0.wp.com/madhavisskinclinic.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/equipment-collage-1.jpg?fit=800%2C800&ssl=1)

## Technology & Equipment

By constantly updating ourselves with latest technology and equipments, we aim to offer state-of-art treatments to keep your skin and hair healthy.

## Meet Our Doctor

![](https://i0.wp.com/madhavisskinclinic.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/drm2.jpeg?fit=651%2C651&ssl=1)

## Dr. Madhavi Pudi

MBBS(Gold Medalist), DNB-  Consultant Dermatologist, Trichologist and Cosmetologist

Dr Madhavi Pudi has more than 12 years experience in Dermatology and Cosmetology. She did her MBBS from the Andhra Medical College, Vishakhpatnam, where she scored distinction in microbiology and pathology. She is one of the few doctors in India to have cleared her DNB degree in the first attempt. She has been certified by the National Board of Examination

Started in 2010, with a vision to bring affordable Skin Care to everyone, Dr.Madhavi’s Advanced Skin Hair and Laser Clinic, Hyderabad is a clinical dermatology and skin procedures clinic and has further advanced to all clinical dermatology, trichology (diagnosis and treatment of hair and scalp conditions including hair fall and dandruff), nail disorders and all skin related cosmetic problems.

Dr Madhavi Pudi is aesthetic dermatologist with specialisation in Scar treatment, Botox, Fillers, and all procedures to restore youthful appearance, and enhancing beauty. She started her practice when cosmetology had just begun getting popular in the country. She is one among the group of doctors who developed the field in the state. Since, we are the forefront of the technology we are part of the revolutions & evolutions which occur in here. Hence, we are responsibly driving the evolution of the field forward. For example, melanocyte transfer and grafting used to be a niche technology. We have made it available to the masses.

Nothing is more satisfying than to see patients with critical conditions getting better. However, She find herself more occupied with cosmetic dermatology and aesthetic medicine. Most of her work concentrates around pigmentary disorders, Vitiligo, scarring especially scarring from acne, and old injuries. We use a combination of invasive and non-invasive methods using lasers, intralesional injections and Platelet rich plasma.

Interestingly, we have treated several male patients for balding. We have thus fine-tuned our regimens which include, medications, lotions, PRP and laser rejuvenation for the treatment of male pattern baldness. We also do FUE hair transplantation. Performing advanced cosmetic procedures like Botox, fillers in the initial years of my practice was a bit challenging. After attending several national and international conferences for hands-on workshops in cosmetology gave her a vast experience where she could able to handle celebrity clients in very short span of her practise with good success rate.

She like to keep updating her knowledge, She is very disciplined, systematised & hardworking personality, and hence justify her work getting the best outcome of it. Receiving Gold medal in her MBBS is an example of success in initial days of her journey.

## BEFORE AND AFTER

## Thread Lifting

## Amenities and Treatments at Dr. Madhavi's Advanced Skin Hair and Laser Clinic.

Dr. Madhavi’s Advanced Skin Hair and Laser Clinic offers treatments for all the skin problems, cosmetic surgeries and laser treatments.

Checkout our pages to know more deeply about the problem and solutions we offer.

Book a consultation today.
